name: Reece Runnells
title: Reece Runnells — Full-stack developer
description: Full-stack developer who uses AI tooling and solid engineering to ship fast, reliable results.
author: Reece Runnells

homeCallout.lede: I build end-to-end: services, APIs, UIs, and the glue between them. Modern AI assistants and automation are part of the toolkit—not a gimmick, but a way to compress design–build–learn loops.
homeCallout.sub: Pragmatic stack choices, clear tradeoffs, and momentum toward something shippable. Employer- and domain-specific detail lives under Experience.
